title: Doctrin - Digital Triage and Care Navigation Platform
problem: Healthcare providers face patient communication overload. Phone lines are busy, patients don't know where to seek care, and case management is fragmented across channels.
solution: Digital communication platform with automated medical history taking, AI-assisted triage, chat/video consultations, and case management tools for healthcare providers.
technology: AI triage, chat, video, EHR integration
target_customer: Primary care clinics, specialist clinics, hospital outpatient departments
traction_signals: Active in Sweden, Norway, Czech Republic, UK, France
Deployed by major Nordic healthcare providers
regulatory_notes: Medical device support tool. Used within existing healthcare provider workflows.
varden_fit: High — direct overlap with Varden's care navigation and booking infrastructure. Digital triage + EHR integration is core to Varden's value proposition. Partnership or learnings opportunity.
notes: Strong Nordics presence. CEO is Dr. Anna-Karin Edstedt Bonamy (pediatric specialist, Karolinska). Direct competitor in some segments but potential partnership opportunity.
